svg.title: Object Diagram: Doctor Generates Prescriptions and Creates Medical Record

g.text: Object Diagram: Doctor Generates Prescriptions and Creates Medical Record
Dr. Sarah Lee finalizes consultation note, generates
2 prescriptions (Amlodipine + Aspirin), and system creates permanent
Prescriptions, finalized note, medical record, closed conversation
FollowUpInstructions = "Follow up in 2 weeks, monitor BP daily"
Instructions = "Take in morning with food. Monitor BP daily."
Instructions = "Continue current medication. Take after meals."
Content = "Patient presented with chest pain and dyspnea..."
